programmes.show_description: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Seoladh albam d'fhilíocht ó bhéal le Micheál D Ó hUiginn 'Against All Certainty'. (A special event celebrating the release of Micheál D Ó hUiginn's debut spoken word album.)
Seisiún ceoil a bhí ag Jinx Lennon agus ag an mbanna The Mary Wallopers i nGaillimh. (Jinx Lennon and The Mary Wallopers collide in Galway.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Tá léargas le feiceáil sa tsraith seo ar an saol sa naíonra. (We get an insight into the wonderful world of the Naíonra.)
Sraith cócaireachta ina dtabharfaidh Susan Ní Bheaglaioch aghaidh ar Patricia Uí Ghamhnáin. (In this programme we see Susan Ní Bheaglaoich go up against Patricia Uí Ghamhnáin.)
Tá ceamaraí socraithe i gcarranna sa chaoi is go mbeifear in ann cúléisteacht le tiománaithe & a gcuid paisinéirí. (Cars across Ireland are rigged with cameras allowing us to eavesdrop.)
Brian Ó Domhnaill as Anagaire Co. Dhún na nGall a bheidh ar chlár an lae inniu. Brian Ó Domhnaill from Donegal is this week's guest.
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
An féidir anraith a dhéanamh as clocha? (Stone soup? Is it even possible?)
Tá an tUasal Easóige cinnte go mbeidh an bua aige sa rás mór. (Weasel is sure he'll win the big race.)
Agus é ina Oifigeach Sábháilteachta, socraíonn Cory deireadh a chur leis na rialacha sosa. (Cory becomes the class Safety Officer and decides to banish any lunchtime rules.)
Tá na hasail ag léamh leabhair faoi shárlaochra. (The donkeys are reading a book about superheroes.)
Tá meaisín ag Zee le lúbraí a dhéanamh ach briseann sé i ngarraí MacBarm. (Zee & MacBarm set up their corn maze with the help of Zee's Zee Mobile, until it breaks down.)
Is é an muileann gaoithe foinse cumhachta na feirme ach níl sé ag casadh! (The source of the farm's power is a windmill, but it's not turning.)
Tá plean ag an Ninja Oíche agus ag na Ninjalinos flótaí na paráide a ghoid. (Night Ninja and his Ninjalinos plan to take all the floats in the parade.)
Geallann Finny agus Mara go mbeidh siad múinte tigh Oscair. (Finny and Sammy promise to mind their manners during their playdate at Oscar's house.)
Ní fonn ar bith ar Roy dul chuig an siopa, tá sé an-leadránach! (Roy doesn't want to go to the shop, it's so boring!)
Déanann Ricky a dhícheall rudaí deasa a dhéanamh do chuile dhuine inniu. (Today, Ricky tries his very best to do good deeds for everyone.)
Tá Ricky ag iarraidh eitilt leis na teireadachtalaigh inniu. (Today, Ricky wants to fly like the pterodactyls.)
Tá plean iontach ag Ricky agus a chairde chun na daoine a fásta a choinneáil gnóthach. (Ricky and his friends come up with a great plan that will keep the grown ups busy.)
Beidh na Singalings ag tabhairt aghaidh ar an Artach inniu. (Today the Singalings are going to the Arctic.)
Tabharfaidh na Singalings aghaidh ar an dufair inniu, áit atá lán le plandaí éagsúla. (The Singalings are going to the jungle, where there are lots of different plants.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Nic ag iarraidh fanacht ina dhúiseacht i gcaitheamh na hoíche. Tugann an Cat Nic agus Sailí ar eachtra san oíche. (Nick wants to stay awake all night.)
Ba mhaith le Sailí sliogán mar an ceann atá ag Nic. (Nick has a super-duper special shell and Sally wants one too!)
Féachann Nic agus Sailí le puball a chur suas ach cinneann sé orthu. (Nick and Sally are trying to put up a tent in their backyard but it's not working!)
Tagann Nic agus Sailí ar uibheacha éin sa chúlghairdín ach bíonn a nead millte. (Nick and Sally have found some bird eggs in their backyard, but their nest is destroyed.)
Tá Nic agus Sailí ag spraoi sa ghaineamh ach níl aon áit acu le caisleáin a dhéanamh. (Nick and Sally are playing in their sandbox.)
Tá Zak agus a chuid cairde ag iarradh duais a bhuachan i gcluiche ríomhaireachta. (Zak & his friends are trying to win a computer game so that they can win a prize.)
Tá máthair Zak ag ceapadh go dteastaíonn bearradh gruaige uaidh ach níl Zak ar aon intinn léi. (Zak's Mom tells him he needs a haircut, much to his chagrin.)
Bíonn ríra agus ruaille buaille i dteach nua athair Nic nuair a thugann sé frog isteach sa teach i ngan fhios. (Nic sneaks his pet frog into his dad's new house, but chaos ensues.)
Tá imní Shani go n-athróidh cúrsaí sa mbaile nuair a thagann a deirfiúr uchtaithe. (Shani prepares for her new adopted sister but worries about how her home will change.)
Tá bréagán caillte ag Pax agus téann Polly á chuardach. (When Pax's favourite toy gets lost, Polly travels to Lost and Found world to find it.)
Dar le Daideo bhí uair ann nach raibh aon gháire ann! (According to Daideo the world was a much more serious place years ago when laughter hadn't even been invented yet!)
Téann Leithreas Lugh siar san am chun bac a chur ar Naomh Pádraig. (Leithreas Lugh travels back in time to stop St Patrick from bringing Christianity to Ireland.)
Buaicphointí ó chluichí CLG an deireadh seachtaine, Iomáint, Peil, Peil na mBan agus Liathróid Láimhe san áireamh. (Highlights of the weekend's GAA action.)
Clár faoin turas a rinne 50 imreoir CLG go dtí an Chéinia chun milliún crann a chur. (50 GAA Players take a trip to Kenya to plant 1 million trees.)
An tseachtain seo: Lios na Scéithe V An Baile Nua. (This week: Lisnaskea V Newton Butler.)
Ordaítear d'fhoireann de chuid na Cónaidhme traein párolla de chuid an Aontais a robáil. (A Confederate team is ordered to rob a Union payroll train.)
Tugtar spléachadh sa tsraith seo ar an díograis a theastaíonn chun seónna talmhaíochta a bhuachan. (This series celebrates the passion needed to be Ireland's 'Best in Show'.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tá ceant Survivor ar ais ach ní mar a shíltear a bhítear! (The classic Survivor auction is back with a twist!)
Scéal 4 chapall mór le rá a bheidh sa gclár seo - Limestone Lad, Danoli, Dorans Pride agus Beef Or Salmon. (We take a look at Ireland's most famous National Hunt horses.)
Caitheann Denis Kirwan súil chun cinn ar Fhéile Rásaíocht Seilge Náisiúnta Cheltenham 2026. (Denis Kirwan looks ahead to the 2026 Cheltenham National Hunt Racing Festival.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Luimneach agus Corcaigh i mbabhta 6 de Shraith Iomána Allianz. (Live coverage of Limerick v Cork in round 6 of the Allianz Hurling League.)
Tugann an t-aisteoir Bríd Ní Neachtain as Ros Muc léargas ar a gairm bheatha d'Áine sa gclár seo. (Bríd Ní Neachtain gives Áine an insight into her career as an actress.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Caithfidh teaghlach as Éirinn dul i dtaithí ar shráideanna garbha Hell's Kitchen. (A family of Irish immigrants adjust to life on the mean streets of Hell's Kitchen.)
Is beag atá ag tarlú i saol triúr fear i mBaile Átha Cliath an lae inniu. Three friends go back in time to Easter 1916, they realise they have the power to change Irish history.
Faigheann Manue agus Johanna amach go raibh caidreamh ag Nour le fear a bhí níos sine ná í. (Manue and Johanna discover Nour's affair with an older man.)
Léargas ar an dul chun atá déanta i dtaighde ailse. (Evelyn O'Rourke brings two cancer survivors face to face with two cancer researchers.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
An tseachtain seo: Lios na Scéithe V An Baile Nua. (This week: Lisnaskea V Newton Butler.)
Caitheann Denis Kirwan súil chun cinn ar Fhéile Rásaíocht Seilge Náisiúnta Cheltenham 2026. (Denis Kirwan looks ahead to the 2026 Cheltenham National Hunt Racing Festival.)
Buaileann Áine le Siobhán de Paor agus a páirtí Diarmuid Lyng sa gclár seo. (Áine gets an insight into the lives of Siobhán de Paor and her partner Diarmuid Lyng.)
Rachaidh Mairéad Ní Chuaig agus Conall Ó Máirtín ag spailpínteacht timpeall na hEorpa. (Mairéad Ní Chuaig and Conall Ó Máirtín go WWOOFing around Europe!)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Briseann Ribín druma Dhris trí thimpiste. (Ribín breaks Dris' drum by accident.)
Oíche Shamhna atá ann agus tá na Meicneoirí ag imirt bob nó bia. (The Mechanics go trick or treating on Halloween.)
Socraíonn Chrissy an lá a chaitheamh ag déanamh aithrise ar Cory. (Chrissy decides to spend the day copying Cory.)
Is é breithlá Cud é agus tá na hasail ag iarraidh cóisir a eagrú di. (It's Cud's birthday, and the donkeys want to organise a surprise party.)
Tá Zee ag iarraidh roicéad a láinseáil ach tá an chumhacht imithe! (The power shuts off at Sunny Field Farm just as Zee is about to launch his newest rocket into space.)
Briseann trucail an fheirmeora DeBrún síos ar an mbealach le beatha chuig na sicíní. (Farmer MacBarm truck breaks down on his way to feed the chickens.)
Ligeann Romeo air féin gurb é Owlette é. (Romeo uses a machine to disguise himself as Owlette.)
Is é lá breithe Finny atá ann agus tá sí ag ceapadh go bhfuil dearmad déanta ag gach duine ar a lá mór. (It's Finny's Birthday today and she thinks that everyone has forgotten.)
Cé atá ag goid sneaiceanna Igam Ogam? (Igam Ogam investigates why her snacks keep disappearing.)
Féachann an Mac Tíre Crosta gan bheith chomh scanrúil. (The Big Bad Wolf makes an effort to be less scary so Paulo can have friends.)
Caithfidh Prionsa a léiriú dá chairde go bhfuil misneach aige. (Prionsa has to prove that he is brave in front of all his friends.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tagann fail ar Lola nuair a bhíonn sí ag cleachtadh do cheolchoirm na scoile. (Lola gets the hiccups when practising for the school concert.)
Tá Charlie curtha soir ag Lola mar gheall nach mbíonn sí ag éisteacht. (Lola isn't listening properly and it's very frustrating for Charlie.)
Tugann Lotta féirín do Lola ach ní maith léi ar chor ar bith é. (Lola receives a gift from Lotta that she doesn't like at all.)
Tá Lola ag iarraidh damhsa nua a fhoghlaim. (Lola tries to find a dance that suits her.)
Is breá le Lola a bheith ag tabhairt aire do chat Mhamó agus Dhaideo. (Lola loves looking after Granny and Grandpa's cat Caspar.)
Féachann Zak agus Jason a bheith mór leis an gcailín nua ar an mbaile. (A new girl moves into the area and Zak and Jason decide to befriend her.)
Tá Zak agus a chairde ag súil go mór leis an gclár deiridh de 'Long Spáis' san oíche Dé Sathairn. (Zak and his friends are really excited to see the last episode of 'Star Trick'.)
Tá an tUasal agus Bean Uí Phluidín ag comóradh deich mbliana sa scoil. (There's a ten year anniversary coming up in school & Joey, Yassine & Olive want to plan a surprise party.)
Tá Aodhán ag iarraidh trioblóid a tharraingt air féin sa gcaoi is nach gcaithfidh sé dul chuig ceolchoirm. (Joey has to teach his friend how to get into trouble.)
Tá Bean Uí Phluidín sa bhaile tinn agus is í an príomhoide atá chun an lón a réiteach. (When Mrs Blanket is out sick the headmistress takes on the school lunches.)
Beidh Aisling ag foghlaim faoi bhrionglóidí i Ros Treabhair. (Aisling learns about dreams in Rostrevor.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Faigheann Blanche amach go bhfuil an iomarca tionóntaí aici. (Blanche discovers she has exceeded the legal number of tenants she is allowed.)
Tá Rose ag ceapadh go bhfuil a fear céile atá caillte ag úsáid rudaí neamhbheo chun teagmháil a dhéanamh léi. (Rose thinks her late husband is trying to communicate with her.)
Tá na conraitheoirí ar fud na tíre faoi bhrú an tseachtain seo le neart sadhlais agus tuí le baint. (The contractors tackle more silage and hay harvesting.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir an Clár agus Loch Garman i mbabhta 6 de Shraith Iomána Allianz. (Live coverage of Clare v Wexford in round 6 of the Allianz Hurling League.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Port Láirge agus Tiobraid Árann i mbabhta 6 de Shraith Iomána Allianz. (Live coverage of Waterford v Tipperary in the Allianz Hurling League.)
Craoladh iarbheo ar an gcluiche idir Cill Dara agus Ceatharlach i mbabhta 6 de Shraith Iomána Allianz. (Deferred coverage of Kildare v Carlow in the Allianz Hurling League.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Súil siar ar Chluiche Ceannais Iomána Allianz 2013 idir Cill Chainnigh agus Tiobraid Árann. (A look back at the 2013 Allianz Hurling League Final: Kilkenny v Tipperary.)
Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Emma Ní Fhíoruisce agus an banna Grooveline a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Emma Ní Fhíoruisce and Grooveline rise to the challenge.)
Tá Ken ag iarraidh an dallamullóg a chur ar Thadhg go sáróidh sé a bhannaí. (Ken tries to pull the wool over Tadhg's eyes as he tries to use his bail restrictions against him.)
Tugann an fidléir Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Thír Eoghain chun blaiseadh de cheol na háite a fháil.(Doireann Ní Ghlacáin visits Tyrone, discovering its rich musical heritage.)
Tugann Pauline Scanlon aghaidh ar Ellen's Pub i Sligeach chun togha an cheoil a chloisteáil. (Pauline Scanlon visits Ellen's Pub in Sligo to hear a wealth of music.)
Cuid de na buaicphointí ó Fhéile na mBan 2026. (Some of the highlights from Féile na mBan 2026.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
